title: ValidationReport
description: Walk-forward validation report for an alpha candidate. Documents split policy, OOS results, symbol stability, regime breakdown, cost stress, NO_TRADE comparison, MHT/data-snooping controls, and overfit risk. Owned by AlphaForge. P0.8E: MHT controls added, nested required strengthened, regime taxonomy aligned to V7 canonical (TREND_UP/DOWN/RANGE/TRANSITION), cost stress expanded with spread+funding_deferred_block, calibration mapped to G6. Multiple hypothesis testing and data snooping controls. BLOCKING: NONE_APPLIED or NOT_RUN prevent strong edge/profitability claims. Reports may still be generated but must be marked HOLD or BLOCKED_FOR_MHT.

chronological_split.description: Must be true. No shuffling across time.

fold_count.description: Minimum 6 walk-forward folds required. P0.8E: minimum 6 folds required for all modes (aligned to V7 G2: WALK_FORWARD_OOS).

folds.description: Minimum 6 walk-forward folds. Each fold: 12-month train, 2-month validation.

test_ic.description: Per-fold Information Coefficient — PRIMARY AlphaForge metric.

oos_summary.description: OOS summary. P0.8E-FIX (2026-07-02): IC/Rank IC added as primary AlphaForge metrics. Trade-level metrics (Sharpe, win rate) remain for V7 consumption but are no longer required.

oos_ic.description: Information Coefficient — rank correlation between predicted R and realized R. PRIMARY AlphaForge metric.

oos_rank_ic.description: Rank IC — does AlphaForge correctly rank-order symbols by expected return?

oos_calibration_error.description: ECE — Expected Calibration Error for probability estimates.

oos_ic_stability.description: Standard deviation of IC across folds — lower is better.

oos_sharpe.description: V7-consumption metric — NOT AlphaForge's success metric.

symbol_stability.description: Symbol stability assessment. Max single symbol concentration: 0.40. Max cluster concentration: 0.60.

max_single_symbol_concentration.description: Maximum fraction of total edge from any single symbol. Must be <= 0.40. P0.8E: max single symbol contribution to total edge. Must be <=0.40 per V7 G5.

max_cluster_concentration.description: Maximum fraction of total edge from any symbol cluster. Must be <= 0.60. P0.8E: max correlated cluster contribution to total edge. Must be <=0.60 per V7 G5.

cross_symbol_metric_variance.description: Quantitative variance of OOS expectancy across symbols, or qualitative assessment of cross-symbol variance.

cost_stress.description: Cost stress analysis. Required components: fee, slippage, spread_or_proxy, funding_or_deferred_block. Empty cost_stress must fail validation.

baseline_spread_pct.description: P0.8E: baseline spread or spread proxy estimate. Required for cost stress.

spread_or_proxy.description: Spread assumption or proxy used for cost calculation.

funding_or_deferred_block.description: Funding cost treatment: DEFERRED (blocks perpetual/live claims) or APPLIED with rate.

combined_stress_edge_survives.description: Edge survives combined 2x fee + 2x slippage stress.

break_even_cost_total_pct.description: Total cost percentage at which edge breaks even.

cost_edge_destroyed.description: True if edge is destroyed at baseline costs.

scalp_cost_adjusted_expectancy_r.description: P0.8E: SCALP reference minimum cost-adjusted OOS expectancy. Must be >=0.10R per V7 G3.

funding_deferred_block.description: P0.8E: required when funding model is DEFERRED. Blocks live/perpetual promotion.

no_trade_comparison.description: Comparison of active trading vs doing nothing. Empty no_trade_comparison must fail validation.

saved_loss_r.description: P0.8E: saved loss in R terms from NO_TRADE.

missed_opportunity_r.description: P0.8E: missed opportunity in R terms from NO_TRADE.

multiple_hypothesis_control.description: P0.8E: MHT and data-snooping controls. Required — reports without MHT control carry a blocking hold. BLOCKING: NONE_APPLIED or NOT_RUN prevent strong edge/profitability claims. Reports may still be generated but must be marked HOLD or BLOCKED_FOR_MHT.

mht_status.description: MHT control status. NOT_RUN or NONE_APPLIED: edge/profitability claims are blocked; report must be marked HOLD or BLOCKED_FOR_MHT.

tested_feature_count.description: Total number of features screened/tested across all hypotheses.

correction_method.description: MHT correction method used. NONE_APPLIED requires a blocking hold. Examples: Bonferroni, Holm-Bonferroni, Benjamini-Hochberg (FDR), Deflated Sharpe Ratio (DSR), PBO (probability of backtest overfitting), family-wise error rate (FWER) control.

false_discovery_control.description: Whether FDR or equivalent false discovery control is active. FDR control method description or NONE if not applied.

deflated_sharpe_or_equivalent.description: Deflated Sharpe ratio or PBO risk assessment result.

deflated_sharpe_or_pbo_assessment.description: Deflated Sharpe Ratio or Probability of Backtest Overfitting assessment result. Required when MHT is applied.

trial_count_disclosure.description: Number of trial configurations tested. Must be disclosed honestly even if MHT was not applied.

rejected_candidate_count.description: Number of candidates rejected during this research run.

blocking_hold.description: Required if correction_method is NONE_APPLIED. Explains why MHT was not run.

mht_block_reason.description: If mht_status is NOT_RUN or NONE_APPLIED: explain why MHT was not applied and what evidence is blocked.

calibration_gate_alignment.description: P0.8E: calibration reliability mapped to V7 G6: CALIBRATION_RELIABILITY.

verdict.description: Validation verdict. P0.8E: FAIL_MHT added for MHT/data-snooping failures. BLOCKED_FOR_MHT when multiple_hypothesis_control.mht_status is NOT_RUN or NONE_APPLIED.
